### Props

| Name        | Type      | Required | Default     | Description                                                                                                                                 |
| ----------- | --------- | -------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `heading`   | `string`  |          | `undefined` | Optional text to show as a heading of the note card                                                                                         |
| `showAlert` | `boolean` |          | `undefined` | Enforce the `alert` role on the note card. The alert role should only be used for information that requires the user's immediate attention. |
| `text`      | `string`  |          | `undefined` | The message text of the note card                                                                                                           |
| `type`      | `string`  |          | `'warning'` | Type or severity of the message                                                                                                             |

| --------- | -------- | ----------- |
